Class EmailAddressRecognizer

java.lang.Object
guiTools.EmailAddressRecognizer
public class EmailAddressRecognizer extends Object

Title: FSM-translated EmailAddressRecognizer.

Description: A demonstration of the mechanical translation of Finite State Machine diagram into an executable Java program using the Email Address Recognizer. The code detailed design is based on a while loop with a select list

Copyright: Lynn Robert Carter © 2022

Version:
0.00 2018-02-04 Initial baseline, 2.00 2022-01-06 Rewritten to recognize email addresses and enhanced to support FSM with up through 999 states for the trace output to align nicely, 3.00 2022-03-22 Adjusted to clean up the code and resolving alignment issues with the design and to correct the issue with an empty email address
Author:
Lynn Robert Carter

  • Constructor Details

      public EmailAddressRecognizer()

      Method: EmailAddressRecognizer()

      Description: This default constructor is not used in this system.

  • Method Details

    • checkEmailAddress

      public static String checkEmailAddress(String input)
      This method is a mechanical transformation of a Finite State Machine diagram into a Java method.
      Parameters:
      input - The input string for the Finite State Machine
      Returns:
      An output string that is empty if every things is okay or it will be a string with a help description of the error follow by two lines that shows the input line follow by a line with an up arrow at the point where the error was found.
